description: Analyze the binding interactions of the kinase inhibitor imatinib (Gleevec/STI-571) with its protein target using crystal structure PDB:1IEP. Produce a publication-quality figure of the drug binding site and a written report characterizing the key protein-drug interactions, including the distance from the gatekeeper residue to the inhibitor and a complete list of binding pocket residues within 4 Angstroms of the drug. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/abl_imatinib.png and the report to ~/PyMOL_Data/abl_binding_report.txt.
